name: Tomorimon
description: A Ghost Digimon that floats lightly, covered in a gas-like substance. Its body glows faintly. Characterized by appearing at night, it has been sighted in various regions throughout the Eastern Digital World , floating in the dead of night while glimmering faintly. When it senses that it is in danger, it blinds the opponent with its " Hinotama ", in which it makes the gas surrounding its body glow intensely.
